cost_model_scope: Minimum realism haircut model applied as round-trip cost on every realized trade after signal/exit generation and before position-sizing portfolio aggregation.
cost_model_limitations: Current cost model is haircut-only and not execution-aware.
Current cost model does not model order book depth, queue position, fill uncertainty, or partial fills.
Current cost model is sufficient for promotion closeout because OOS and holdout remain clearly negative after costs.
promotion_decision_reason: Out-of-sample average return per trade is already negative after costs (-0.3909%), final holdout average return per trade is also negative after costs (-0.7867%), and out-of-sample drawdown remains far above the 20% threshold at 37.5149%. The current cost model is not yet execution-aware, but these negative post-cost results are already sufficient to close the promotion path for the current frozen stack.
what_this_decision_does_not_mean: This is not opening the governance gate.
This is not opening paper trading.
This does not mean the current cost model is already final or perfect.
